---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for WeaveFFI
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what currently makes it difficult?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, CLI flag, IDL feature, generator output, or workflow you
would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative designs you considered.

## Target(s)

Which target generators or project areas would this affect?

- [ ] C
- [ ] C++
- [ ] Swift
- [ ] Android / Kotlin
- [ ] Node.js
- [ ] WebAssembly
- [ ] Python
- [ ] .NET
- [ ] Dart
- [ ] Go
- [ ] Ruby
- [ ] CLI / core / IR / docs / other

## Additional context

Links, examples, prior art, or sketches are welcome.
